title: Babymetal Legend - 43 the Movie
overview: In April 2023, SU-METAL (vocal, dance), MOAMETAL (scream, dance), and MOMOMETAL (scream, dance) entered a new stage as the new BABYMETAL, and since then, they have embarked on their largest-ever world tour, "BABYMETAL WORLD TOUR 2023-2024," visiting 25 countries including Japan.  The 98 performances, excluding festivals and guest act appearances, recorded a total audience of over 280,000 people.
